# Imunify360 Documentation

> Imunify360 is a security solution for Linux web servers based on machine learning technology. It provides advanced firewall, intrusion detection, malware scanning, patch management, and proactive defense against zero-day attacks.

## Introduction to Imunify360

- [Introduction](https://docs.imunify360.com/introduction/index.md)

## Terminology

- [Terminology](https://docs.imunify360.com/terminology/index.md)

## Licensing

- [Licensing](https://docs.imunify360.com/billing/index.md)

- [Installation Guide](https://docs.imunify360.com/installation/index.md)

- [Generic panels and no-panel installation and integration](https://docs.imunify360.com/control_panel_integration/index.md)
